name: Hazelnut (or Almond) Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Almonds or hazelnuts; coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Recipe from "Pacific Northwest Palate"
In a mixer, blend together butter, sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt.
Add eggs one at a time until the mixture is light and fluffy. Stir in nuts.
Sift flour and baking powder into the sugar mixture. Stir until combined.
Chill for at least 2 to 3 hours.
Shape dough into loaves about 1 inch thick, 2 inches wide, and as long as your greased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool. Cut loaves into 1-inch diagonal slices. Lay slices cut side down on a baking sheet and return to oven for 5 to 10 minutes until lightly toasted. Sprinkle with powdered sugar. Store in an air tight container. These will last a long time if you can keep from eating them.
